_meta.description: R2A sonic fingerprint test: Calvin Harris (Stadium EDM, difficulty: Easy-Medium). No artist name in caption. 3 seeds. Locked 2026-05-17.

captions.ace_step: Stadium EDM, 128 BPM, driving four-on-the-floor kick drum, bright supersaw synth lead, plucked synth arpeggio in verses, heavy sidechain compression pumping under the kick, female pop vocal feature with bright top-end and processed harmonies, anthemic build-up with snare roll into euphoric main drop, uplifting festival energy mood, polished arena production with wide stereo imaging

lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse]
Friday night the city's just beginning
You and me we move like we already won
Hold my hand and don't pretend you're listening
Tonight the only word is gone

[Pre-Chorus]
We can lose the morning we can lose the year
Everything I needed everything is here

[Chorus]
Hold on hold on hold on
We don't need to know where we're going
Hold on hold on hold on
The whole world's right here where we're standing
Hold on hold on hold on
This is everything I waited for
Hold on hold on
Don't let go don't let go

[Verse]
Sunrise will arrive without permission
Concrete is forgiving when you dance
Every face I love is in the building
Tonight the only word is yes

[Chorus]
Hold on hold on hold on
We don't need to know where we're going
Hold on hold on hold on
The whole world's right here where we're standing
